name: Asparagus Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy medium saucepan over medium-low heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until translucent, about 8 minutes.
3. Add flour and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Gradually whisk in milk. Simmer until the mixture thickens, stirring constantly, about 2 minutes.
5. Mix in lemon peel and nutmeg. Remove from heat. Season with salt and pepper.
- (Can be prepared 1 day ahead. Cover white sauce and refrigerate.)
6. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
7. Steam asparagus over boiling salted water until just crisp tender, about 6 minutes.
8. Refresh under cold water; drain.
9. Cut asparagus into 1-inch pieces.
10. Combine asparagus and ricotta in a small bowl.
11. Cook lasagne noodles in a large pot of rapidly boiling salted water until just tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally.
12. Drain. Rinse noodles with cold water; drain well.
13. Spread half of white sauce in the bottom of the pan.
14. Top with a single layer of lasagne noodles (trimming to fit).
15. Cover with half a cup of white sauce.
16. Top with half of asparagus mixture.
17. Top with half each of Swiss cheese and bacon.
18. Continue with another layer of noodles.
19. Cover with remaining white sauce.
20. Top with remaining asparagus mixture, Swiss cheese, and bacon.
21. Cover with remaining noodles.
22. Drizzle with tomato sauce.
23. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
- (Can be prepared 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate. Bring to room temperature before continuing.)
24. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
25. Bake lasagne until heated through, about 20 minutes. Cool slightly before serving.
